topic: A barista preparing a traditional Turkish coffee using a cezve in hot sand.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Hands place the cezve into hot sand, side-angle.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Close-up: foam forms as the cezve brews in the sand.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Front view: hands lift the cezve from the hot sand, steam rising.
parsed_generation.narration: Hands guide the cezve into hot sand and begin the slow brew of traditional Turkish coffee. Foam forms as the heat wakes the brew, then the cezve is lifted from the sand, steam rising.

feedback:
Model is close but diverges from the gold standard in structure and detail. Align the sequence to two 4-second segments showing circular motion of the cezve in hot sand, foam rising to the brim and removal/pouring into a cup, with explicit camera moves (macro, tracking, wide) and the final pour.
Failed checks: example_alignment
strengths: Clear three-shot structure with explicit camera angles
Narration references traditional Turkish coffee and the brewing action
fixes: Adopt the two-interval, 00:00-00:04 and 00:04-00:08 structure; describe moving the cezve in circles through hot sand
Depict foam rising to the brim and removal before boiling; include pouring into a cup; add more camera variety (macro, tracking, wide) and precise textures
